nasb.text: “I will surely snatch them away,” declares the Lord; “There will be no grapes on the vine And no figs on the fig tree, And the leaf will wither; And what I have given them will pass away.” ’ ”

esv.text: When I would gather them, declares the Lord, there are no grapes on the vine, nor figs on the fig tree; even the leaves are withered, and what I gave them has passed away from them.”

cnv.text: 我要徹底除掉他們的莊稼； 葡萄樹上必沒有葡萄， 無花果樹上必沒有無花果， 葉子也必枯乾。 我賜給他們的，都離開他們過去了。’” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 我要彻底灭绝他们。 葡萄树必没有葡萄， 无花果树必没有果子， 树叶也要枯干， 我所赐给他们的都要被夺走。 这是耶和华说的。”
